nasb.text: To make their land a desolation, An object of perpetual hissing; Everyone who passes by it will be astonished And shake his head.

esv.text: making their land a horror, a thing to be hissed at forever. Everyone who passes by it is horrified and shakes his head.

cnv.text: 他們的土地變為荒涼， 成為永遠被人嗤笑的對象； 經過這地的， 都必驚駭搖頭。

ccb.text: 因此，他们的土地必荒凉， 永远遭人嗤笑， 经过此地的人无不惊惧， 摇头叹息。
